fields.name: TimerIRq
fields.description: Timer Unit - the timer counts from 1 to 0

fields.name: CRCIRq
fields.description: CRC-Coprocessor - all data from the FIFO buffer have been processed

fields.name: IdleIRq
fields.description: CIU_Command Register - a command execution finishes

fields.name: RFOnIRq
fields.description: RF Level Detector - an external RF field is detected

fields.name: RFOffIRq
fields.description: RF Level Detector - a present external RF field is switched off

fields.name: ModeIRq
fields.description: data mode detector - the mode has been detected

fields.name: TimerIRq
fields.description: Timer Unit interrupt flag. Set automatically when the timer counts from 1 to 0

fields.name: CRCIRq
fields.description: CRC-Coprocessor interrupt flag. Set automatically when all data from the FIFO buffer have been processed

fields.name: IdleIRq
fields.description: CIU_Command Register interrupt flag. Set automatically when a command execution finishes

fields.name: RFOnIRq
fields.description: RF Level Detector interrupt flag. Set automatically when an external RF field is detected

fields.name: RFOffIRq
fields.description: RF Level Detector interrupt flag. Set automatically when a present external RF field is switched off

fields.name: ErrIRq
fields.description: CIU interrupt flag. Set automatically when an error is detected

fields.name: ModeIRq
fields.description: data mode detector interrupt flag. Set automatically when the mode has been detected

fields.name: IE0_
fields.description: Global interrupt enable. When set to logic 1, the interrupts can be enabled. When set to logic 0, all the interrupts are disabled

Interrupts.name: CIU_CommIEn
Interrupts.description: Control bits to enable and disable the passing of interrupt requests

fields.name: TX_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the transmitter interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_1

fields.name: RX_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the receiver interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_1

fields.name: IDLE_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the idle interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0

fields.name: HI_ALERT_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the high alert interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_1

fields.name: LO_ALERT_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the low alert interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_1

fields.name: ERR_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the error interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0

fields.name: TIMER_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the timer interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0

fields.name: RSVD_6
fields.description: Reserved. This bit must be set to logic 0

fields.name: RSVD_1
fields.description: Reserved. This bit must be set to logic 0

fields.name: P3_
fields.description: P35 pin data I/O according to P3CFGA/B[5] configuration

fields.name: P7CFGB_
fields.description: Configures functional mode of P72 pin with P7CFGA[2]

fields.name: P7_
fields.description: P72 pin data I/O according to P7CFGA/B[2] configuration

fields.name: P3CFGA_
fields.description: Configures functional mode of P35 with P3CFGB[5]

fields.name: P3CFGB_
fields.description: Configures functional mode of P35 with P3CFGA[5]

fields.name: RSVD_0
fields.description: Reserved. This bit must be set to logic 0 by firmware.

fields.name: TF2
fields.description: Timer2 overflow flag. Set to logic 1 by a Timer2 overflow. Set to logic 0 by firmware.

fields.name: RCLK0
fields.description: Timer2 Debug UART Receive Clock selector. When set to logic 1, Debug UART uses Timer2 overflow pulses.

fields.name: TCLK0
fields.description: Timer2 Debug UART Transmit Clock selector. When set to logic 1, Debug UART uses Timer2 overflow pulses.

fields.name: TR2
fields.description: Timer2 Run control. When set to logic 1, Timer2 is started.

fields.name: C_T2
fields.description: Timer2 Counter/Timer selector. When set to logic 1, Timer2 is set to counter operation.

fields.name: T2RD
fields.description: Timer2 ReaD flag. Set to logic 1 by hardware if T2H is incremented between reading T2L and reading T2H.

fields.name: DCEN
fields.description: Timer2 Down Count ENable. When set, Timer2 can be configured as an up-counter.

Debug UART.name: S0CON
Debug UART.description: Control and status register of the Debug UART

Debug UART.name: S0BUF
Debug UART.description: Debug UART transmit and receive buffer register. Writing writes to transmit buffer. Reading reads from receive buffer.

fields.name: S0BUF
fields.description: Writing to S0BUF writes to the transmit buffer. Reading from S0BUF reads from the receive buffer.

fields.name: SET_BIT
fields.description: When set to logic 0 during write operation, the bits set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 0 in the register. When set to logic 1 during write operation, the bits set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 1 in the register.

fields.name: DISABLE_PREAMB
fields.description: Preamble filter disable. When set to logic 1, this bit disables the preamble filtering

HSU.name: HSU_CTR
HSU.description: Configuration control register of the HSU

fields.name: START_FRAME
fields.description: Enables the preamble filter for next frame

fields.name: TX_STOPBIT
fields.description: Defines the number of stop bit during transmission

fields.name: RX_STOPBIT
fields.description: Defines the number of stop bit during reception

fields.name: RX_EN
fields.description: Enables the reception of the HSU

fields.name: HSU_PRESCALER
fields.description: In conjunction with HSU_CNT, defines the HSU baud rate

fields.name: HSU_COUNTER
fields.description: In conjunction with HSU_PRE, defines the HSU baud rate

SPI.name: SPIcontrol
SPI.description: Programmable bits to control SPI block function

SPI.name: SPIstatus
SPI.description: Status bits to monitor SPI interface

FIFO.name: RWL
FIFO.description: FIFO Receive Waterlevel: Controls the threshold of the FIFO in reception

fields.name: RWATERLEVEL
fields.description: Overflow threshold of the Receive FIFO to set a warning

FIFO.name: TWL
FIFO.description: FIFO Transmit Waterlevel: Controls the threshold of the FIFO in transmission

fields.name: TWATERLEVEL
fields.description: Underflow threshold of the Transmit FIFO to set a warning

FIFO.name: FIFOFS
FIFO.description: FIFO Transmit FreeSpace: Status of the number of characters which can still be loaded in the FIFO

fields.name: TRANSMIT_FREESPACE
fields.description: Number of bytes that the CPU can still load into the FIFO until the Transmit FIFO is full

fields.name: RECEIVE_FULLNESS
fields.description: Number of bytes received in the FIFO

fields.name: FIFO_EN
fields.description: Fifo Enable: Set to logic 1 this bit enables the FIFO manager clock (CPU_CLK). Set to logic 0 the clock remains low.

fields.name: TWLL
fields.description: Transmit WaterlLevelLow: This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Transmit FIFO is equal or smaller than the threshold TWaterlevel.

fields.name: TFF
fields.description: Transmit FIFO Full: This is set to logic 1 if the transmit part of the FIFO is full. It is set to logic 0 when a transfer is completed.

fields.name: TFE
fields.description: Transmit FIFO Empty: This bit indicates when the transmit part of the FIFO is empty. It is set to logic 0 when the CPU writes a character in the data register.

fields.name: RWLH
fields.description: Receive WaterLevel High : This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Receive FIFO is greater or equal to the threshold RWaterlevel.

fields.name: RFF
fields.description: Receive FIFO Full: This bit is set to logic 1 if the receive part of the FIFO is full. It is set to logic 0 by reading the FDATA register.

fields.name: RFE
fields.description: Receive FIFO Empty: This bit indicates when the receive part of the FIFO is empty. Set to logic 1, when the Receive FIFO is empty. Set to logic 0, when the Receive FIFO contains at least 1 byte.

fields.name: RESET
fields.description: Reset: Set to logic 1, Reset defines that the bits set to logic 1 in the write command are set to logic 0 in the register.

fields.name: WCOL_IRQ
fields.description: Write COLlision IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 when the transmitted part of the FIFO is already full (TFF is set to logic 1) and a new character is written by the CPU in the data register.

fields.name: TWLL_IRQ
fields.description: Transmit WaterlLevelLow IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Transmit FIFO is equal or smaller than the threshold TWaterlevel.

fields.name: TFF_IRQ
fields.description: Transmit FIFO Full IRQ: This is set to logic 1 if the transmitted part of the FIFO is full.

fields.name: RWLH_IRQ
fields.description: Receive WaterLevel High IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Receive FIFO is greater or equal to the threshold RWaterlevel.

fields.name: ROVR_IRQ
fields.description: Read OVeRrun IRQ: This bit indicates that a read overrun has occured.It occurs when the receiver part of the FIFO is full and a new data transfer is completed. Then the new received data is lost and ROVR_IRQ is set.

fields.name: RFF_IRQ
fields.description: Receive FIFO Full IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 if the received part of the FIFO is full.

FIFO.name: FITEN
FIFO.description: Enables or disables interrupt requests to the CPU and resets Receive and Transmit FIFO content

fields.name: TFLUSH
fields.description: When set to logic level 1, the pointer of the Transmit FIFO is reset. This bit and RFLUSH must not be set at the same time.

fields.name: RFLUSH
fields.description: When set to logic level 1, the pointer of the Receive FIFO is reset. This bit and TFLUSH must not be set at the same time but one after the other.

fields.name: EN_WCOL_IRQ
fields.description: ENable Write COLlision IRQ: When set to logic 1, the WCOL_IRQ is enabled. The bit IE1_5 of register IE1 has also to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: EN_TWLL_IRQ
fields.description: ENable Transmit WaterlLevelLow IRQ: When set to logic 1, the TWLL_IRQ is enabled. The bit IE1_5 of register IE1 has also to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: EN_TFF_IRQ
fields.description: ENable Transmit FIFO Full IRQ: When set to logic level 1, the TFF_IRQ is enabled. The bit IE1_5 of register IE1 has also to be set

fields.name: EN_RWLH_IRQ
fields.description: ENable Receive WaterLevel High IRQ: When set to logic 1, the RWLH_IRQ is enabled. The bit IE1_5 of register IE1 has also to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: EN_ROVR_IRQ
fields.description: ENable Read OVeRrun IRQ: When set to logic 1, the ROVR_IRQ is enabled. The bit IE1_5 of register IE1 has also to be set to logic 1 to enable the corresponding CPU interrupt.

fields.name: EN_RFF_IRQ
fields.description: ENable Receive FIFO Full IRQ: When set to logic 1, the RFF_IRQ is enabled. The bit IE1_5 of register IE1 has also to be set

FIFO.name: FDATA
FIFO.description: Provides the transmitted and received data bytes. Writing pushes to Transmit FIFO, reading pops from Receive FIFO.

fields.name: FDATA
fields.description: Writing to FDATA writes to the transmit buffer. Reading from FDATA reads from the receive buffer.

FIFO.name: FSIZE
FIFO.description: Defines the size of the Receive FIFO. Maximum size is 182 bytes. Free space allocated to Transmit FIFO.

fields.description: Allows the SIGIN active interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0

fields.name: MODE_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the mode interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0

fields.name: CRC_I_EN
fields.description: When set to logic 1, allows the CRC interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0

CIU_Interrupts.name: CIU_CommIrq
CIU_Interrupts.description: Contains common CIU interrupt request flags

fields.name: SET1
fields.description: When set to logic 0 during write operation, the bit set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 0 in the register

fields.name: TX_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, immediately after the last bit of the transmitted data was sent out

fields.name: RX_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1 when the receiver detects the end of a valid datastream

fields.name: IDLE_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when a command terminates by itself

fields.name: HI_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when HiAlert bit in CIU_Status1 register is set to logic 1

fields.name: LO_ALERT_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when LoAlert bit in CIU_Status1 register is set

fields.name: ERR_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if any error flag in the CIU_Error register is set

fields.name: TIMER_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when the timer decrements the TimerValue register to zero

CIU_Interrupts.name: CIU_DivIrq
CIU_Interrupts.description: Contains miscellaneous interrupt request flags. These bits are latched

fields.name: SET2
fields.description: When set to logic level 0 during write operation, the bit set to logic 1 in the write command are written to logic 0 in the register

fields.name: SIGIN_ACT_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when SIGIN is active

fields.name: MODE_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when the mode has been detected by the Data Mode Detector

fields.name: CRC_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when the CRC command is active and all data are processed

fields.name: RF_ON_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when an external RF field is detected

fields.name: RF_OFF_IRQ
fields.description: Set to logic level 1, when an present external RF field is switched off

CIU_Status.name: CIU_Error
CIU_Status.description: Error flags showing the error status of the last command executed

fields.name: WR_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, when data is written into the FIFO by the 80C51 during the AutoColl command

fields.name: TEMP_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the internal temperature sensor detects overheating

fields.name: RF_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if in active communication mode the counterpart does not switch on the RF field in time

fields.name: BUFFER_OVFL
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the 80C51 tries to write data into the FIFO buffer although the FIFO buffer is already full

fields.name: COLL_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if a bit-collision is detected

fields.name: CRC_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if RxCRCEn in CIU_RxMode register is set to logic 1 and the CRC calculation fails

fields.name: PARITY_ERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the parity check has failed

fields.name: TX2CW
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the output signal on pin TX2 will deliver continuously the un-modulated 13.56 MHz energy carrier.

fields.name: CHECKRF

fields.name: TX2RFEN
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the output signal on pin TX2 will deliver the 13.56 MHz energy carrier modulated by the transmission data.

CIU_Tx.name: CIU_TxAuto
CIU_Tx.description: Controls the setting of the antenna driver

fields.name: AUTO_RF_OFF
fields.description: Set to logic 1, own RF field is switched off after the last data bit has been transmitted as defined in the NFCIP-1 standard.

fields.name: FORCE_100ASK
fields.description: Set to logic 1, Force100ASK forces a 100% ASK modulation independent of the setting in CIU_ModGsP register.

fields.name: AUTO_WAKEUP
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the PN532 in CIU Power-down mode can be woken up by the RF level detector.

fields.name: CA_ON
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the collision avoidance is activated and internally the value n is set in accordance to the ISO/IEC 18092 / ECMA340 NFCIP-1 standards.

fields.name: INITIAL_RF_ON
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the initial RF collision avoidance is performed and the bit InitialRFOn is set to logic 0 automatically, if the RF is switched ON.

fields.name: TX2_RF_AUTO_EN
fields.description: Set to logic 1, RF is switched on at TX2 (i.e. Tx2RFEn is set to logic 1) after the external RF field is switched off according to the time TADT.

fields.name: TX1_RF_AUTO_EN
fields.description: Set to logic 1, RF is switched on at TX1(i.e. Tx1RFEn is set to logic 1) after the external RF field is switched off according to the time TADT.

fields.name: MODEDETOFF
